meta.title: Yes, A.I. will save Music
meta.description:
We might aptly describe this film as a "technockumental," blending the essence of a mockumentary—a fictional documentary—with a deep dive into music's transformative journey. This film orbits around the provocative hypothesis that AI can rescue music, presenting technical methodologies to explore this claim. It's a journey through the pivotal changes in music history, a voyage to the past conducted with tools from the future, all the while showcasing the beautiful possibilities afforded by present-day technologies.

↪ Join the Nobodies Collective:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer

↪ contact me: 
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com

A.I. Voice Cloning - Code & Video Tutorial ⤵⤵
https://www.patreon.com/posts/i-voice-cloning-103094314

LLM to Music (Symbolic AI Music Generator) Code ⤵⤵
https://www.patreon.com/posts/llm-to-music-ai-106087503

and Custom chatGPT
https://chatgpt.com/g/g-jvZYawCku-nobody-the-computer-symbolic-music-generator

MusicGen fine-tune generator (video tutorial and Colab Notebook) ⤵⤵
https://www.patreon.com/posts/how-to-fine-tune-98957931

00:00 Intro
00:59 Chapter 1 - Innovation Under Fire - The A.I. and the Haters.
03:36 Chapter 2 - The Voice Unleashed - A.I. Voice Cloning.
08:19 Nico - London
08:56 Chapter 3 - The return of the WOW - A.I. Generative Music.
15:55 Dreams Boys Song
16:40 Chapter 4 - Back To Symbolism - Generate music with LLMs.
22:40 Epic Finale Song
23:06 Outro

thanks to @dadabots_ and @yousuckatproducing for collaborating on this video
